subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having guided Thy servants to the sanctuary of Thy Manifestation, and caused them to recognize Thy proof and Thy path, and made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما هدیت عبادک الی شطر ظهورک و عرفتهم دلیلک و سبیلک و اظهرت
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
